calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Keep America Safe and Beautiful's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
